title: M3-03c: Add rate limit exceeded UI feedback
acceptance_criteria: When server returns 429, shows toast: 'Rate limit exceeded. Please wait.'
When client queue reaches 20, shows warning: 'Message queue full. Oldest messages will be dropped.'
UI shows indicator: '3 messages pending' when offline/queuing
Terminal disables send button when at queue limit
deliverables: Modified: Terminal.tsx with queue status indicator
Modified: WebSocketProvider with rate limit toast handling
